cards.name: TreeParty
cards.description: A Hobbiton party inspired by Bilbo's celebration. Within radius 5, grants Courage to all Humans, Hobbits, and Dwarves for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: BagginsDontLeaveHere
cards.description: All Hobbits within a personal radius of 2-4 hexes, based on each Hobbit's Agent skill, gain Hidden (1 turn) and remove Fear.

cards.name: GoingOnAnAdventure
cards.description: Provide Courage to all Hobbits and Dwarves in a radius of 2.

cards.name: MathomHouse
cards.description: Hobbits in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn). Gain +2 Gold.

cards.name: Riddle
cards.description: Words in the dark can turn a foe aside. Cancels refusal of a duel, and if you are issued one, you win it (1 turn).

cards.name: UnexpectedFireworks
cards.description: A noisy burst startles nearby foes and sends Hobbits darting for cover. In radius 2, hidden enemies are revealed, one enemy unit is shoved aside if possible, and Hobbits gain Hope for 1 turn.

cards.name: SecondBreakfastDiversion
cards.description: A hobbit meal break turns into tactical confusion: in radius 2, Hobbits gain Hidden (1 turn) and enemy non-Hobbits are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: RoadsideArgument
cards.description: A loud roadside quarrel turns into tactical confusion: hidden enemies are exposed, the strongest enemy is shoved one hex away if possible, and Hobbits in radius 2 gain Haste.

cards.name: TeaTimeAmbush
cards.description: A cheerful tea break turns into a trap: allied Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 become Hidden (1), and the strongest nearby enemy owner loses 1 gold or resource while you collect the tribute.

cards.name: ShirriffInterruption
cards.description: A fussy local shirriff turns a roadside stop into trouble: enemy non-army characters in radius 1 are Halted while allied Hobbits and Humans become Hidden.

cards.name: BarrowWightWhisper
cards.description: Whispers from the Barrow-downs sap the will of nearby enemies. In radius 2, hidden enemies are exposed, enemy units gain Despair for 1 turn, and the weakest enemy is Halted for 1 turn.

cards.name: MuddyLaneDetour
cards.description: A bad road and a worse choice of route drains supplies. Choose the strongest enemy in your hex: their side loses 1 random non-gold resource, or 1 gold if no such resource is available.

cards.name: LanternsAtBreeGate
cards.description: Bree gate lanterns expose suspicious movement. Reveal all hidden enemy units in your current hex, then reveal all hexes in radius 2.

cards.name: OldForestTurnabout
cards.description: The paths twist against your foes. Enemy units in your current hex lose the rest of their movement this turn, and one allied unit there gains Haste for 1 turn.

cards.name: RoomAtTheLastInn
cards.description: A shared stop and a warm room restore the road-worn. Heal all characters in your current hex by 15.

cards.name: Road to Rivendell
cards.description: The road to Rivendell clears the way. Hobbits and Dwarves in radius 2 gain Courage and Haste, and Fear/Halted are removed.

cards.name: Prancing Pony Passage
cards.description: At the Prancing Pony, the road-worn are gathered in. Move up to 2 Hobbit or Dwarf allies from adjacent hexes into your hex, heal them 10, and gain 1 gold.

cards.name: Greenway Diversion
cards.description: A sudden detour on the Greenway unearths trouble. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 1, shove the strongest enemy unit in your hex aside if an empty adjacent hex is available, and make the enemy owner pay a road tax.

cards.name: Bree Rumours
cards.description: Whispers in Bree expose hidden trouble and help the road-wise read the ground. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. Allied Hobbit, Dwarf, and Human units in radius 2 gain reduced difficulty for Scout Area and Find Artifact for 2 turns.

cards.name: The Sack of Bag End
cards.description: When the Ring-bearers were gone, Bag End drew hungry hands and prying eyes. The richest nearby enemy in radius 2 must yield 2 gold, or a resource in its stead.

cards.name: Barrow Chill
cards.description: The chill of the Barrow-downs settles in. Enemy units in radius 2 gain Frozen for 1 turn, and the weakest enemy is Blocked for 1 turn.

cards.name: Crickhollow Diversion
cards.description: The Riders of the Night are led astray by a crooked little diversion at Crickhollow. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. Enemy units in radius 2 gain RefusingDuels (1), and the strongest enemy is Blocked (1).

cards.name: Barrow Lilies
cards.description: White lilies blooming among the Barrow-downs mark buried treasure and buried dread alike. Enemy units in radius 2 gain Despair (2).

cards.name: Bombadil's Whim
cards.description: Tom Bombadil's merry whim sends one wandering threat off the path and leaves the road behind humming. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. The strongest enemy in radius 2 is shoved one hex away if possible, and your nation gains 1 gold if it moved.

cards.name: Elven Lull
cards.description: An elf-song drifts over the camp and the company falls into a strange and gentle sleep. Allied Elf units in radius 2 gain Haste (1). All non-elf enemy units in radius 2 gain Blocked (1) for 1 turn.

cards.name: Water Lilies
cards.description: White lilies on the water hide a quiet rescue route. Reveal hidden enemy units on shore or shallow water in radius 2. Allied Hobbit, Dwarf, and Elf units on shore or shallow water in radius 2 heal 10 and gain Haste (1).

cards.name: Old Man Willow Song
cards.description: The willow's song tugs at the roots and makes the forest go quiet. Enemy units in forest hexes in radius 2 lose all remaining movement for the turn, and allied Hobbit units in forest hexes in radius 2 gain Hidden (1).

cards.name: Climbing the White Hills
cards.description: A hard climb gives a clear view of the White Towers and the Sea. Reveal the surrounding area, and allied Hobbit and Dwarf units in hills in radius 2 gain Haste (1) and Hope (1).

cards.name: Travel through the Marsh
cards.description: The marsh drags at boots and whispers poison into the road. Enemy units in swamp or shallow water in radius 2 gain Poisoned (1) and Halted (1), while allied Hobbit units in those terrains gain Hidden (1).

cards.name: Old Ruins of Arthedain
cards.description: Broken stones of Arthedain still remember lost kings and lost roads. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. Allied Hobbit and Dunedain units in radius 2 gain Hope (1), and your nation gains 1 gold if any hidden enemy was revealed.

cards.name: The Ford
cards.description: Water and shore alike can become a passage or a trap. Allied Hobbit and Dwarf units on shore or shallow water in radius 2 gain Haste (1) and Hidden (1), while enemy units on those terrains gain Halted (1).

cards.name: Weathertop
cards.description: On the watch hill, every shadow is visible and every shadow is dangerous. Reveal hidden enemy units in radius 2. Enemy units on hills in radius 2 gain Fear (1), and the strongest enemy in radius 2 is Blocked (1).

cards.name: Floating in Barrels
cards.description: A very Shire sort of escape: the current carries the unwary, and the barrels keep the small folk hidden. Move up to 2 allied Hobbit units from shore or shallow water in radius 2 into your hex if possible, then those units heal 10 and gain Hidden (1).

cards.name: Butterflies
cards.description: Butterflies drift through the glade and change what can be seen and what can be trusted. Allied Hobbit and Elf units in radius 2 gain Hope (1) and Hidden (1), and hidden enemy units in forest or grassland in radius 2 are revealed.

cards.name: Travel in Safety
cards.description: A sturdy cart lets the little folk travel safely across the farm roads. Move up to 2 allied Hobbit or Dwarf units from adjacent hexes into your hex if possible. Those units heal 10 and gain Hidden (1), and if they moved from plains or grasslands they also gain Hope (1).
